beskrivelse.no: HR-sikkerhet, insider threat, sikkerhetsbevissthet, BYOD, fjernarbeid og menneskelig faktor
beskrivelse.en: HR security, insider threat, security awareness, BYOD, remote work, and human factors

risikoelement.en: Missing background checks during hiring

saarbarhet.no: Kritiske roller ansatt uten screening
saarbarhet.en: Critical roles are filled without screening

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Background screening policy, politiattest for sensitive roller, education verification, employment history check
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Establish a background screening policy, require criminal record checks where lawful and relevant, verify education, and verify employment history

risikoelement.no: Nye ansatte får tilgang før de forstår sikkerhetskravene
risikoelement.en: New employees receive access before they understand the security requirements

saarbarhet.no: Nyansatte får tilganger før sikkerhetsopplæring
saarbarhet.en: New hires receive access before security training

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Obligatorisk sikkerhetsintroduksjon før systemtilgang, signering av taushetserklæring, policybekreftelse og sikkerhetsquiz
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Require security induction before system access, signed confidentiality commitments, policy acknowledgement, and a basic security quiz

risikoelement.en: Access rights are not removed during offboarding

saarbarhet.no: Tidligere ansatte beholder tilgang til systemer
saarbarhet.en: Former employees retain access to systems

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Automated offboarding arbeidsflyt, HR-system integration, exit sjekkliste, immediate tilgang revocation, asset return
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Automated offboarding workflow, HR system integration, exit checklist, immediate access revocation, asset return

eksisterendeBeskyttelse.no: HR melder fra til IT ved avslutning av arbeidsforhold
eksisterendeBeskyttelse.en: HR notifies IT when employment ends

risikoelement.en: No exit interviews or offboarding meetings

saarbarhet.no: Misfornøyde/truende ansatte ikke identifisert ved avgang
saarbarhet.en: Disgruntled or high-risk employees are not identified during departure

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Structured exit interview, threat vurdering, graduated offboarding for high-risk terminations, overvåking post-termination
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Structured exit interview, threat assessment, graduated offboarding for high-risk terminations, monitoring post-termination

risikoelement.en: Role changes are not reflected in access rights

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte akkumulerer tilganger ved jobbytte internt
saarbarhet.en: Employees accumulate access when changing roles internally

foreslaatteTiltak.no: HR trigger for tilgang gjennomgang ved rolleendring, birthright tilgang per rolle, automated deprovisioning of old role
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Trigger an access review when roles change, define birthright access per role, and automatically remove access from the old role

risikoelement.no: Konsulenter og innleide styres ikke som ansatte
risikoelement.en: Contractors and consultants are not governed with the same security controls as employees

saarbarhet.no: Eksterne konsulenter har for høy tilgang, manglende screening
saarbarhet.en: External consultants have excessive access and are not screened sufficiently

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Policy for håndtering av konsulenter, samme screening som for ansatte, tidsbegrenset tilgang, separat identitetslivssyklus og krav om taushetserklæring
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Contractor management policy, same screening as employees, time-limited access, separate identity lifecycle, NDA requirements

risikoelement.en: Malicious insider

saarbarhet.no: Ansatt med legitim tilgang misbruker den bevisst
saarbarhet.en: An employee with legitimate access intentionally abuses it

foreslaatteTiltak.no: User behavior analytics (UBA), anomaly detection, privileged tilgang overvåking, psychological safety/reporting culture
foreslaatteTiltak.en: User behavior analytics (UBA), anomaly detection, privileged access monitoring, psychological safety/reporting culture

risikoelement.no: Data exfiltration av ansatt som skal slutte
risikoelement.en: Data exfiltration by an employee who is leaving

saarbarhet.no: Ansatt kopierer data før avgang
saarbarhet.en: An employee copies data before departure

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Pre-termination overvåking, DLP alerts, USB blocking, sky upload overvåking, graduated tilgang removal
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Pre-termination monitoring, DLP alerts, USB blocking, cloud upload monitoring, graduated access removal

risikoelement.en: Conflicts of interest are not handled

saarbarhet.no: Ansatt jobber for konkurrent eller har andre conflicts of interest
saarbarhet.en: An employee works for a competitor or has other conflicts of interest

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Conflict of interest disclosure, periodic attestation, overvåking av sensitive roller, ethics opplæring
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Conflict of interest disclosure, periodic attestation, monitoring of sensitive roles, ethics training

risikoelement.en: Privileged users are not subject to enhanced monitoring

saarbarhet.no: Admins kan gjøre hva som helst uten deteksjon
saarbarhet.en: Admins can do almost anything without detection

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Privileged tilgang Management (PAM), session recording, dual control for sensitive ops, continuous overvåking
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Privileged Access Management (PAM), session recording, dual control for sensitive ops, continuous monitoring

risikoelement.no: Ukultur eller mistrivsel øker risikoen for innsiderhandlinger
risikoelement.en: Poor culture or dissatisfaction increases the risk of insider actions

saarbarhet.no: Dårlig arbeidsmiljø øker motivasjon for sabotasje
saarbarhet.en: A poor working environment increases motivation for sabotage

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Positiv sikkerhetskultur, varslingsmekanismer, HR-risikoindikatorer, psykologisk trygghet og analyse av exitsamtaler
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Positive security culture, whistleblower mechanisms, HR risk indicators, psychological safety, exit interview analysis

risikoelement.en: Employees lack fundamental security awareness

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte kjenner ikke grunnleggende sikkerhetsprinsipper
saarbarhet.en: Employees know not grunnleggende sikkerhetsprinsipper

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Kontinuerlig bevisstgjøringsprogram, mikrolæring, gamification, rollebasert opplæring og security champions
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Continuous awareness program, micro-learning, gamification, role-based training, security champions

risikoelement.en: Employees faller for phishing-angrep

saarbarhet.no: Klikker på phishing-linker, oppgir credentials
saarbarhet.en: Klikker on phishing-linker, oppgir credentials

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Frequent phishing simulations, immediate feedback, targeted opplæring for clickers, reporting mechanisms, MFA
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Frequent phishing simulations, immediate feedback, targeted training for clickers, reporting mechanisms, MFA

risikoelement.en: Social engineering and pretexting

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte manipuleres til å utlevere informasjon eller utføre handlinger
saarbarhet.en: Employees are manipulated into disclosing information or performing actions

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Social engineering awareness, verification procedures, challenge culture, callback verification for sensitive requests
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Social engineering awareness, verification procedures, challenge culture, callback verification for sensitive requests

risikoelement.no: Passordpraksis gjør kontoer lette å kompromittere
risikoelement.en: Password practices make accounts easy to compromise

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte bruker svake eller gjenbrukte passord
saarbarhet.en: Employees use weak or reused passwords

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Passordmanager, passkeys/FIDO2, MFA enforcement, compromised password detection, passwordless authentication
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Passordmanager, passkeys/FIDO2, MFA enforcement, compromised password detection, passwordless authentication

risikoelement.en: Employees do not report security incidents

saarbarhet.no: Fear of blame culture, ikke tydelige rapporteringskanaler
saarbarhet.en: Fear of blame culture, not tydelige rapporteringskanaler

foreslaatteTiltak.no: No-blame reporting culture, easy reporting mechanisms, phish report button, recognition for reporting, transparency
foreslaatteTiltak.en: No-blame reporting culture, easy reporting mechanisms, phish report button, recognition for reporting, transparency

risikoelement.en: Insecure home offices and remote work

saarbarhet.no: Svak hjemme-wifi, familie bruker jobbmaskin, manglende fysisk sikkerhet
saarbarhet.en: Weak hjemme-wifi, family members user jobbmaskin, missing Physical security

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Retningslinjer for sikkerhet på hjemmekontor, VPN, zero trust, enhetsstyring og sikkerhetsvurderinger av hjemmekontor
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Home office security guidelines, VPN, zero trust, device management, security assessments for home office

risikoelement.no: BYOD (Bring Your Own enhet) ikke styrt
risikoelement.en: BYOD (Bring Your Own Device) not styrt

saarbarhet.no: Private enheter brukes til jobbdata uten kontroll
saarbarhet.en: Private devices are used for work data without sufficient control

foreslaatteTiltak.no: MDM/MAM for BYOD, containerization, conditional tilgang, app-based tilgang (not enhet), data separation
foreslaatteTiltak.en: MDM/MAM for BYOD, containerization, conditional access, app-based access (not device), data separation

risikoelement.en: Offentlige wifi-network kompromitterer data

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte jobber fra kafé, fly, hotell uten VPN
saarbarhet.en: Employees work from cafes, airports, and hotels without VPN

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Always-on VPN, zero trust nettverk tilgang (ZTNA), HTTPS everywhere, public wifi awareness
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Always-on VPN, zero trust network access (ZTNA), HTTPS everywhere, public wifi awareness

risikoelement.no: Arbeidsenheter deles med familie eller andre i hjemmet
risikoelement.en: Work devices are shared with family members

saarbarhet.no: Familie bruker jobbmaskin, barn installerer spill, etc.
saarbarhet.en: Family members use work devices and children install games or other software

foreslaatteTiltak.no: enhet assignment policy, separate user accounts, awareness, technical controls (no admin rights), MDM enforcement
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Device assignment policy, separate user accounts, awareness, technical controls (no admin rights), MDM enforcement

risikoelement.en: Insufficient physical security during remote work

saarbarhet.no: Skjerm synlig for andre, dokumenter liggende ute, enhet theft
saarbarhet.en: Screens are visible to others, documents are left exposed, and devices can be stolen

foreslaatteTiltak.no: personvern screens, screen timeout, encryption, cable locks, clear desk for home office, camera covers
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Privacy screens, screen timeout, encryption, cable locks, clear desk for home office, camera covers

risikoelement.en: Hybridkontor create sikkerhetsgap

saarbarhet.no: Rotasjonsordninger gjør sikkerhetstiltak inkonsistente
saarbarhet.en: Rotasjonsordninger makes security measures inkonsistente

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Zero trust-arkitektur, enhetsbasert sikkerhet fremfor lokasjonsbasert sikkerhet, konsistente policyer og retningslinjer for fleksible arbeidsplasser
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Zero trust architecture, device-based security (not location), consistent policies, hot-desking guidelines

risikoelement.no: Clean desk / clear screen ikke praktisert
risikoelement.en: Clean desk / clear screen not praktisert

saarbarhet.no: Sensitive dokumenter/skjermer synlige for besøkende/renhold
saarbarhet.en: Sensitive documents or screens are visible to visitors or cleaning staff

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Håndheving, tilgjengelige makuleringsmaskiner, automatisk skjermlås etter tre minutter, låste skuffer og sikkerhetspåminnelser
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Enforcement, shredders tilgjengelig, auto screen lock (3 min), locked drawers, security reminders

risikoelement.en: Visitors are not escorted or monitored adequately

saarbarhet.no: Eksterne personer kan bevege seg fritt og få tilgang til sensitive områder
saarbarhet.en: External persons can move freely and gain access to sensitive areas

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Mandatory escort policy, visible visitor badges, tilgang restrictions for visitors, photo ID requirement, logbook
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Mandatory escort policy, visible visitor badges, access restrictions for visitors, photo ID requirement, logbook

risikoelement.no: Tailgating / piggy-backing inn i sikrede områder
risikoelement.en: Tailgating or piggybacking into secured areas

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte holder døren for andre uten ID-sjekk
saarbarhet.en: Employees hold the door open for others without checking identification

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Bevisstgjøring mot tailgating, mantraps i områder med høyt sikkerhetsnivå, kultur for å be om badge og sikkerhetsskilting
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Anti-tailgating awareness, mantraps for high-security areas, badge challenge culture, security signage

risikoelement.en: Meeting room security is insufficient and sensitive discussions can be overheard

saarbarhet.no: Strategiske møter i usikrede rom, whiteboards ikke slettet
saarbarhet.en: Strategic meetings are held in unsecured rooms, and whiteboards are not erased afterwards

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Classified meeting room ratings, soundproofing, whiteboard protocols, confidential waste bins, room sweeps
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Classified meeting room ratings, soundproofing, whiteboard protocols, confidential waste bins, room sweeps

risikoelement.en: USB drops / baiting attacks

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte plugger inn funnet USB uten sjekk
saarbarhet.en: Employees plugger inn funnet USB without check

foreslaatteTiltak.no: USB blocking (technical), awareness opplæring, safe USB check procedures, alternative sharing methods
foreslaatteTiltak.en: USB blocking (technical), awareness training, safe USB check procedures, alternative sharing methods

risikoelement.no: Dumpster diving - sensitive dokumenter ikke destruert
risikoelement.en: Dumpster diving exposes sensitive documents that were not securely destroyed

saarbarhet.no: Papir kastes i vanlig søppel uten makulering
saarbarhet.en: Papir kastes in vanlig waste without makulering

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Mandatory shredding for confidential, secure disposal bins, certified destruction service, digital-first policyer
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Mandatory shredding for confidential, secure disposal bins, certified destruction service, digital-first policies

risikoelement.en: Accidental datalekkasje (human error)

saarbarhet.no: Email til feil mottaker, feil vedlegg, public sharing ved uhell
saarbarhet.en: Email is sent to the wrong recipient, the wrong attachment is included, or content is shared publicly by mistake

foreslaatteTiltak.no: DLP warnings, external email banners, sharing confirmations, classification labels, double-check culture
foreslaatteTiltak.en: DLP warnings, external email banners, sharing confirmations, classification labels, double-check culture

risikoelement.en: Misconfigurations of security controls

saarbarhet.no: Ansatte konfigurerer systemer feil, skaper sårbarheter
saarbarhet.en: Employees misconfigure systems and thereby create vulnerabilities

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Infrastructure as code, konfigurasjonsvalidering, sikkerhetslinting, endringstesting, rollback-prosedyrer og konfigurasjonsgrunnlinjer
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Infrastructure-as-code, config validation, security linting, change testing, rollback procedures, config baselines

risikoelement.en: Stress and tidspress gives snarveier

saarbarhet.no: Under press hoppes sikkerhetsprosedyrer over
saarbarhet.en: Under pressure, established security procedures are skipped

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Automated controls (not manuell), realistic deadlines, psychological safety to raise concerns, technical debt sporing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Automated controls (not manual), realistic deadlines, psychological safety to raise concerns, technical debt tracking

risikoelement.en: Missing sikkerhetskompetanse in utviklingsteam

saarbarhet.no: Utviklere kjenner ikke secure coding practices
saarbarhet.en: Utviklere know not secure coding practices

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Opplæring i sikker koding, OWASP Top 10-bevissthet, security champions, SAST-verktøy og opplæring i threat modeling
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Secure coding training, OWASP Top 10 awareness, security champions, SAST tools, threat modeling training

risikoelement.en: Alert fatigue - sikkerhetsvarsler ignoreres

saarbarhet.no: For mange false positives gjør at folk ignorerer varsler
saarbarhet.en: too many false positives makes at folk ignorerer alerts

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Alert tuning, reducing false positives, risk-based prioritization, automation, meaningful alert context
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Alert tuning, reducing false positives, risk-based prioritization, automation, meaningful alert context
